item.title: 0.4.4 beta (build 26)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.4 private beta

  • Dockscape height is now continuously adjustable from 2× to 5× the Dock height
  • A precise 0.05-step slider replaces the former preset-only height picker
  • Dragging Dockscape's top-edge grip preserves the exact resulting height
  • An intentional pull beyond the maximum still detaches Dockscape into Floating mode

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
